title: Academic Degree Requirements Electives
content:
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science - Electives and Tracks
Morgan State University

---

ELECTIVE COURSES

COSC 239 - Java Programming
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: COSC 112 with a grade of "C" or higher

COSC 301 - Web Technologies
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: COSC 112 with a grade of "C" or higher

COSC 470 - Artificial Intelligence
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: COSC 220 with a grade of "C" or higher

COSC 472 - Introduction to Machine Learning
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: COSC 112 with a grade of "C" or higher, MATH 312 with a grade of "C" or higher

COSC 460 - Computer Graphics
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: COSC 220 with a grade of "C" or higher

---

NEW TRACKS AVAILABLE

1. Quantum Computing Track
2. Cybersecurity and AI Track

Note: There are no additional courses required, but students need to select electives that fall under each track to meet the requirements.
